# Daily Report — 2026-06-24

## Task Completed
Added `create_change_schedule` tool (POST cmn_schedule). Supports required `name`
field plus optional `schedule_type`, `time_zone`, `active` (default True), `parent`
(name or sys_id, auto-resolved), and `description`. Body is built without None fields.
Parent name is resolved to sys_id via the existing `_resolve_change_schedule_sys_id`
helper before the POST is sent. Registered in `change_coordinator` and `full` packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1808
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing vulnerabilities in third-party dependencies (setuptools, urllib3, wheel) —
not introduced by this change.

## Files Changed
- src/servicenow_mcp/tools/change_tools.py (CreateChangeScheduleParams + create_change_schedule)
- src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py (import + __all__ entry)
- src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py (import + tool definition)
- config/tool_packages.yaml (change_coordinator + full packages)
- tests/test_create_change_schedule.py (17 new tests)

## Next Up
Add update_change_schedule tool (PATCH cmn_schedule/{sys_id}; optional fields, empty-body guard)
